# RoutingRule

> Model routing rule per organization — route to cheapest qualifying model

## Fields

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| id | uuid | yes | auto | Primary key |
| name | string | yes | - | Rule name |
| promptCategory | string | yes | - | Which prompt category this rule applies to |
| minQualityScore | float | yes | - | Minimum acceptable quality score (0-1) |
| maxCostUsd | float | yes | - | Maximum cost per call |
| maxDurationMs | integer | yes | - | Maximum acceptable latency |
| preferredModels | json | yes | - | Ordered list of preferred models |
| excludedModels | json | yes | - | Models to never use |
| enabled | boolean | yes | true | Whether this rule is active |
| priority | integer | yes | 0 | Rule priority (higher = checked first) |
| createdAt | datetime | yes | auto | Creation timestamp |
| updatedAt | datetime | yes | auto | Last update timestamp |

- `GET /api/routing-rule` — List all
